title: 我喜欢住民宿。
pinyin: Wǒ xǐ huan zhù mín sù.
titleTranslation: Men mehmon uylarida turishni yaxshi ko'raman
titleTranslation_ru: Я люблю останавливаться в гостевых домах
description_uz: «Sayohatga chiqqaningda qayerda turasan?» — sayohat turar joyi haqidagi suhbat. Bu dialog mehmon uylari (minsu) va mehmonxonalarni taqqoslash, bron qilish (Airbnb), tozalik, uy egasi, bir kechalik narx va xavfsizlikni muhokama qilishni mashq qiladi. Sayohat mavzusidagi foydali so'zlar — takrorlab o'rganish uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Где ты останавливаешься, когда путешествуешь?» — разговор о жилье в поездке. Диалог тренирует, как сравнить гостевые дома и отели, бронирование (Airbnb), чистоту, хозяев, цену за ночь и безопасность. Полезная лексика о путешествиях — идеально для повторения.
description_en: «Where do you stay when you travel?» — a chat about travel lodging. This dialogue practices comparing homestays and hotels, booking (Airbnb), cleanliness, hosts, the price per night, and safety. Useful travel vocabulary—perfect for repetition.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ chū qù lǚ yóu zhù nǎr?
sentences.text_translation_en: Where do you stay when you travel?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xǐ huan zhù mín sù.
sentences.text_translation: Men mehmon uylarida turishni yaxshi ko'raman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я люблю останавливаться в гостевых домах.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wèi shén me bú zhù jiǔ diàn?
sentences.text_translation_en: Why not stay in a hotel?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 民宿便宜，而且有家的感觉。
sentences.pinyin: Mín sù pián yi, ér qiě yǒu jiā de gǎn jué.
sentences.text_translation: Minsu arzon, ustiga uy hissi bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Гостевые дома дешевле, и есть ощущение дома.
sentences.text_translation_en: Homestays are cheaper, and they feel like home.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zài nǎr dìng mín sù?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 在爱彼迎上订，上面有很多选择。
sentences.pinyin: Zài Ài bǐ yíng shàng dìng, shàng miàn yǒu hěn duō xuǎn zé.
sentences.text_translation: Airbnb'da bron qilaman, unda tanlov ko'p.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Бронирую на Airbnb, там много вариантов.
sentences.text_translation_en: I book on Airbnb — there are lots of choices.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zhù guo jǐ cì, dōu hěn gān jìng.
sentences.text_translation: Bir necha marta turganman, hammasi juda toza edi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я останавливался несколько раз, всегда было чисто.
sentences.text_translation_en: I've stayed a few times — all very clean.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Fáng dōng hǎo xiāng chǔ ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Are the hosts easy to get along with?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很好，有一次还给我们做了早饭。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn hǎo, yǒu yí cì hái gěi wǒ men zuò le zǎo fàn.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yaxshi, bir marta hatto bizga nonushta ham tayyorlab berishdi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень хорошо, однажды даже приготовили нам завтрак.
sentences.text_translation_en: Very nice — once they even made us breakfast.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Jià gé dà gài duō shao yì wǎn?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 看城市，一般两百到三百块。
sentences.pinyin: Kàn chéng shì, yì bān liǎng bǎi dào sān bǎi kuài.
sentences.text_translation: Shaharga bog'liq, odatda ikki yuzdan uch yuzgacha.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Зависит от города, обычно двести-триста юаней.
sentences.text_translation_en: Depends on the city — usually 200 to 300 yuan.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 安全的，你看评价再订就行。
sentences.pinyin: Ān quán de, nǐ kàn píng jià zài dìng jiù xíng.
sentences.text_translation: Xavfsiz, sharhlarni o'qib keyin bron qilsang bo'ldi.
sentences.text_translation_en: They're safe — just read the reviews before booking.
sentences.speaker: B
